context.projectOverview: Sprint 4 (final) of Claude Opus 4.8 Support. Add a provider-agnostic Message variant for a mid-conversation system instruction, rendered by the Anthropic adapter as a mid_conv_system content block (with optional ephemeral cache_control). Non-anthropic adapters render best-effort text or skip without throwing. This is the most architecturally involved sprint.
relevantFiles: src/providers/types.ts — Message union (TextMessage | AssistantMessage | ToolResultMessage); add the new variant + export
src/providers/anthropic.ts — toAnthropicMessage() converts Message -> Anthropic.Messages.MessageParam; add the mid_conv_system branch
src/providers/anthropic.test.ts — top-level vi.mock; assert the emitted block shape (ttl + no-ttl)
src/providers/openai.ts, google.ts, openai-compat.ts — non-anthropic Message conversion; handle the new variant WITHOUT throwing (best-effort text or skip)

confirmedSdkFacts.MidConversationSystemBlockParam: interface MidConversationSystemBlockParam { type: 'mid_conv_system'; content: <text-block array or string per SDK>; cache_control?: CacheControlEphemeral | null; ... } — at @anthropic-ai/sdk/resources/messages/messages.d.ts; it IS a member of the ContentBlockParam union, so it can be placed inside a message's content[].
confirmedSdkFacts.cacheControlEphemeral: CacheControlEphemeral has type:'ephemeral' and an optional ttl ('5m' | '1h'). The prompt-caching helpers already use this type.
confirmedSdkFacts.note: Read the EXACT MidConversationSystemBlockParam shape from node_modules before constructing it (whether content is string or block array, and the exact cache_control/ttl typing). Do NOT cast to any.

keyPrinciples: NO role:'system' message variant — the Messages API has no system role in the messages array; use the mid_conv_system content block.
Provider-agnostic Message variant in types.ts; @anthropic-ai/sdk stays only in anthropic.ts.
Every Message-union member must be HANDLED in each adapter's conversion (exhaustive) or typecheck/strict will complain; non-anthropic = best-effort text or skip, never throw.
ESM .js imports; import type; no stray any. Conventional commit: bober(sprint-4): <description>.
baselineNote: Tolerated failures: the 2 flaky 37-tool-count tests + occasionally disk.test.ts (race). Any other failure, or any src/providers/ failure, is a regression.
